claim: Example Company was founded in 2020 and is headquartered in San Francisco, CA.
detail: The company was started by Jane Doe and John Smith to simplify business intelligence.

claim: Example Company offers ExamplePro, a cloud-based analytics dashboard.
detail: ExamplePro provides real-time business metrics, custom reports, and team collaboration features.

claim: ExamplePro is available in three tiers: Starter ($29/mo), Pro ($79/mo), and Enterprise (custom pricing).
detail: Starter supports up to 5 users. Pro supports unlimited users. Annual plans receive a 20% discount.

claim: Example Company is the only analytics platform with built-in AI anomaly detection trained on industry benchmarks.
detail: Their AI models are retrained monthly using aggregated anonymized data from all customers.
Yes, ExamplePro supports SAML 2.0 and OAuth 2.0 single sign-on on the Pro and Enterprise plans.

claim: Example Company offers a 30-day money-back guarantee on all paid plans.
detail: Customers can request a full refund within 30 days of their first payment with no questions asked.

claim: ExamplePro is used by e-commerce businesses to track conversion rates and reduce cart abandonment.
detail: Over 200 e-commerce customers use the platform specifically for funnel analysis.

claim: Support is available via email at support@example.com and live chat on weekdays 9am–6pm PT.
ExamplePro integrates natively with Salesforce, HubSpot, Stripe, Shopify, and Segment.
detail: All integrations are available to Pro and Enterprise plan users.
